testing.notes: No test infrastructure found. This repository contains developer tools, scripts, and example pipelines for Data Science Pipelines (DSP) development, not a library or application with unit tests.

ci.notes: No CI/CD configuration found. No .github/workflows, .tekton, Jenkinsfile, or other CI system configs present.

build.notes: This is a repository of developer tools and scripts, not a formal project with a build system. Contents include: (1) dev-setup scripts for local DSP development environment, (2) example KFP pipelines in example-pipelines/, (3) Kubernetes manifests in manifests/, (4) toolbox/ with a containerized dev environment Dockerfile. The main.sh script generates configuration files from templates for local DSP API server development.

conventions.import_style: Python scripts use standard imports; KFP components defined with @component decorator
conventions.notes: Repository structure: (1) Shell script templates in dev-setup/templates/ use placeholder syntax like <namespace> and <dspa> for substitution, (2) KFP pipeline components declare dependencies via packages_to_install parameter (e.g., pandas, scikit-learn, tf2onnx), (3) Kubernetes manifests use kustomize overlays pattern in cloudbeaver/ and external-connection-setup/

container_recipe.notes: No dependencies to install. Scripts are standalone with minimal imports from Python stdlib and KFP SDK (for pipeline examples). Validation performed: Python syntax check on all .py files (passed), bash syntax check on executable shell scripts (passed). Template shell scripts (.sh files in templates/) contain placeholders and are not directly executable.
